Container.title: Container
Container.description: Represents a shipping container being repaired.

foreign_code.description: The foreign identification code of the container.

local_code.description: The local identification code associated with the container.

type.description: Whether the container was initially registered as foreign or local.

status.description: The current repair or billing status of the container.

is_ready_billing.description: Flag indicating if the container is ready for billing.
